name: Sweetheart Strawberry Valentine Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, mix sugar and gelatin until well blended.
2. Beat together egg yolks and milk in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the gelatin mixture.
3. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until the gelatin is dissolved (about 5 minutes).
4. Remove from heat and stir in strawberry cordial and vanilla. Chill until the mixture mounds when dropped a spoon.
5. Beat egg whites until frothy. Gradually add the second portion of sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
6. Whip chilled cream with the remaining sugar until soft peaks form.
7. Fold in the chilled mixture into the whipped cream, then turn into a 2-quart heart-shaped mold.
8. Cover with aluminum foil and freeze.
9. About one hour before serving, unmold onto a chilled serving plate. For easier removal, cover the bottom of the mold with paper.
10. Garnish with a piping of whipped cream and strawberries.
